subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-01-05
subcodes.first_line: The winds were blowing from every direction. Some requested me not to come, but I said: 'This is the feast of the believers of God...'
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @education of children; moral education
